flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Monroe College rose 15% between 2006 and 2009 ($10.2k → $11.7k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Monroe College fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (62.9% → 55.6%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Monroe College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($16.7k → $18.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Monroe College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
